thoughts.whatWouldChangeMind: AutoBot would change its mind if stop loss or drawdown reaches 4.0%; Trend alignment, 50dma, or 200dma condition breaks; and Research turns materially negative or contradicts the setup.
thoughts.whyItCanWork: AutoBot still thinks this can work because The decision engine accepted a pullback setup with confidence 0.8; Reward/risk was estimated at 1.8 against the configured floor; and Trend alignment passed, reducing the chance of fighting the primary move.
